title: ranunculus orthoceras
intro: Ranunculus orthoceras, also known as Orthocarpus or Orthoceras, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus orthoceras include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
